name: Neiroy, the Dream Mirror Disciple
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>夢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鏡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>徒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>と</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ネイロイ
name_jp_tl: Apostle of the Dream Magic Mirror - Neiroi
desc: If a "Dream Mirror" monster(s) is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, you can make this card become DARK. If this card is Special Summoned by the effect of a "Dream Mirror" monster: Activate this effect; if "Dream Mirror of Joy" is on the field, you can return 1 Spell/Trap your opponent controls to the hand, also, after that, if "Dream Mirror of Terror" is on the field, draw 1 card, then shuffle 1 card from your hand into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Neiroy, the Dream Mirror Disciple" once per turn.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Returns from your hand to your Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
